name: mongodb-hacker-starter
description: LiveKit + MongoDB Atlas voice agent starter (Python or Node agent + Next.js frontend)

scripts.setup: pnpm install:frontend && pnpm install:agent-py && pnpm install:agent-ts && pnpm env:copy
scripts.env:copy: test -f frontend/.env.local || cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env.local; test -f agent-py/.env.local || cp agent-py/.env.example agent-py/.env.local; test -f agent-ts/.env.local || cp agent-ts/.env.example agent-ts/.env.local
scripts.dev: echo 'Use pnpm dev:py or pnpm dev:ts to pick a runtime.' && exit 1
scripts.lint: concurrently -n agent-py,agent-ts,frontend -c cyan,yellow,magenta "pnpm lint:agent-py" "pnpm lint:agent-ts" "pnpm lint:frontend"
scripts.format: pnpm --dir frontend format && uv --directory agent-py run ruff format . && pnpm --dir agent-ts format
